{{- /* Search modal. Hidden until opened by the nav trigger, Cmd/Ctrl-K, or "/". data-index points at the JSON search index (see layouts/index.json), which search.js fetches on first open. Lives at body level so its fixed overlay isn't trapped by the nav's backdrop-filter containing block. */ -}}
{{ partial "icon.html" (dict "name" "search" "class" "cs-search-field-ico") }}
    {{ i18n "search_no_results" }}
    ↑↓ {{ i18n "search_hint_navigate" }} ↵ {{ i18n "search_hint_open" }} esc {{ i18n "search_hint_close" }}
